title: urochloa adspersa
intro: Urochloa adspersa, also known as hairy panic grass or hairy panic, is a species of grass native to the tropical regions of Africa, Asia, and Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Urochloa adspersa include the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
